inputs.reasoning: Named capture group exercises the parser's named group handling path, plus character class ranges.
Nested repetitions stress the compiler's handling of repeated subexpressions and potential loop detection.
Unicode property class exercises the Unicode category lookup and character class compilation paths.
Large counted repetition exercises the repeat-expansion code in the compiler.
Negated character class with hex escapes covering non-ASCII range exercises character class complement logic.
Non-capturing group with case-insensitive flag combined with alternation and counted repetition.
Perl character classes (\b, \w, \s, \d) exercise the perl_groups lookup and word boundary handling.
Deeply nested non-capturing groups with alternation stress the recursive parser and alternation compiler.
Anchored pattern with alternation and negated character classes, exercises anchor and class compilation.
Counted repetition of a capturing group exercises group repeat expansion and the concat/repeat compiler paths.
